corrected_assertion: The notebook directory is renamed from notebooks/mae-video-ingestion/ to notebooks/video-ingestion/. Rationale: the video-ingestion pipeline is now domain-general — it ingests trading-floor videos, clinical training-room videos, and refactor-session screencasts. The 'mae-' prefix incorrectly suggested the pipeline was trading-only. Both files migrate with high similarity (R086 for the .ipynb, R063 for the README); content is updated to reflect the broader scope. Any path references in upstream notebooks or docs that point to notebooks/mae-video-ingestion/ must update to notebooks/video-ingestion/.
source: git commit 90538da 'paper(verum + turboquant): formalize EBR ↔ Verum cryptographic pairing; reframe TurboQuant as historical reference' 2026-05-28
